top_signals.title: Rep. Warnock: Wall Street vs Main Street
top_signals.summary: Senator Raphael Warnock (D-GA) tells David Gura on Bloomberg This Weekend that the focus of the country should be on how local Main Streets are doing, not on well Wall Street is doing. Watch part one of Senator Warnock's interview now and tune in to Bloomberg This Weekend tomorrow for part two. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
